name: ChannelAdvisor (Rithum) Multichannel Commerce API
what_it_does: ChannelAdvisor (now Rithum) REST API for multichannel ecommerce management platform. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog and listing syndication across Amazon, Walmart, eBay, and 100+ marketplaces, handle inventory and pricing optimization across channels, retrieve order management and fulfillment data, access channel analytics and performance reporting, manage advertising campaign data (Amazon Ads, Google Shopping), handle dropship and supplier management, retrieve marketplace fee and profitability analytics, and integrate multichannel commerce data with ERP and WMS systems.
use_cases: Syndicating product listings across Amazon, Walmart, and marketplaces from catalog automation agents
Managing inventory and pricing across channels from multichannel commerce agents
Retrieving order and fulfillment data from ecommerce operations agents
Accessing marketplace performance analytics from channel intelligence agents
not_for: Single-channel sellers without multichannel marketplace complexity
Direct-to-consumer brands without third-party marketplace presence
Small ecommerce without enterprise-scale catalog and channel management needs
best_when: A mid-to-large ecommerce retailer or brand using ChannelAdvisor/Rithum wants AI agents to automate product listing syndication, inventory and pricing optimization, order management, and marketplace analytics across Amazon, Walmart, and other channels.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated pricing changes across marketplace channels can trigger price wars or violate MAP policies. Marketplace listing automation must comply with platform-specific rules. Amazon suspension risk from policy violations. Inventory discrepancies between channels cause overselling and customer service issues.

auth.notes: ChannelAdvisor uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with catalog, orders, and analytics scopes. Well-documented developer portal. Webhooks for order and inventory events. Rebranding to Rithum after CommerceHub merger 2022.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — multichannel commerce enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: GMV-based and module pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Durham, North Carolina. Founded 2001. Market leader for multichannel ecommerce management. Merged with CommerceHub 2022, rebranding as Rithum 2023. 3,000+ retail brands. $10B+ GMV managed. Connections to 300+ selling channels. Competes with Linnworks and Feedonomics for multichannel commerce.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated pricing changes can violate MAP policies and trigger marketplace seller violations
Rithum rebranding from ChannelAdvisor — some legacy API endpoints may still reference old branding
No public MCP server — well-documented OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Amazon policy compliance — automated listing changes must avoid ToS violations and suspension risk
Inventory sync across channels is critical — overselling causes order cancellations and marketplace penalties
CommerceHub merger may affect API surface — verify current API compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: Multichannel commerce and pricing data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Marketplace pricing sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Multichannel ecommerce data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. MAP policy and pricing sensitivity.
